summary: Iteration 136: Dashboard Compare Toggle and Menu Item Schedule features - All tests PASSED
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_Scheduled_Item_136 during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard Compare Toggle and Menu Item Schedule features fully implemented and tested. All 11 backend API tests passed. UI testing confirmed: 1) Dashboard Compare Toggle shows Day/Week/Month buttons with Compare switch, clicking Week auto-enables compare and displays 6 comparison cards (Sales, Expenses, Profit, Transactions, Cash, Bank) with current vs previous period values and % change. 2) Menu Item edit dialog has Schedule tab with: Enable Schedule toggle, 7 day buttons (Sun-Sat), quick select buttons (Select All, Weekdays Only, Weekends Only), time window inputs (From/To) with presets (All Day, Lunch 11-3, Dinner 6-11), and unavailable behavior options (Show as Disabled, Completely Hide). CashierPOS has isItemScheduleActive() function that filters items based on schedule.

backend_api_tests: test_01_period_compare_day - PASS: Returns period=day, labels (Today/Yesterday), current/previous/change metrics
test_02_period_compare_week - PASS: Returns period=week, labels (This Week/Last Week), all metrics with % change
test_03_period_compare_month - PASS: Returns period=month, labels (This Month/Last Month), date ranges
test_05_create_menu_item_with_schedule - PASS: Creates item with schedule enabled, days, times, behavior
test_06_get_menu_item_with_schedule - PASS: Schedule persists on GET
test_07_update_menu_item_schedule_to_hide - PASS: Updates schedule to hide behavior
